prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small red metal cube
  - obj_1: large purple rubber cylinder
  - obj_2: small green metal cylinder
  - obj_3: large purple rubber sphere
  - obj_4: large purple metal sphere
  - obj_5: small brown metal cylinder
  - obj_6: small purple metal sphere
  - obj_7: small purple metal cylinder
  - obj_8: small cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_9: small brown metal sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0041] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0042] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0043] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0044] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0045] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0046] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0047] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0048] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0049] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0050] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0051] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0052] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0053] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0054] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0055] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0056] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0057] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0058] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0059] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0060] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in the scene and compare distances between pairs of objects.

Let me estimate the positions of each object based on the image:

- obj_0 (small red metal cube): right-center area, slightly back
- obj_1 (large purple rubber cylinder): far right-back area... wait, let me re-examine. The large purple rubber cylinder is in the front-center area
- obj_2 (small green metal cylinder): back-center area
- obj_3 (large purple rubber sphere): left side, front area
- obj_4 (large purple metal sphere): center-left, front area
- obj_5 (small brown metal cylinder): center, front area
- obj_6 (small purple metal sphere): right side, front area
- obj_7 (small purple metal cylinder): right-center, front area
- obj_8 (small cyan rubber cylinder): back-left area
- obj_9 (small brown metal sphere): back-left area (behind obj_8)

Let me re-examine more carefully:

- obj_9 (small brown metal sphere): far back-left
- obj_8 (small cyan rubber cylinder): back area, slightly right of obj_9
- obj_2 (small green metal cylinder): back-center
- obj_4 (large purple metal sphere): center-left
- obj_3 (large purple rubber sphere): far left
- obj_5 (small brown metal cylinder): center area
- Large purple rubber cylinder (obj_1): front-center
- obj_7 (small purple metal cylinder): front-right area
- obj_0 (small red metal cube): center-right, slightly back
- obj_6 (small purple metal sphere): right side

Now let me estimate distances for each question:

obj_0 (red cube) to obj_2 (green cylinder): moderate distance, both in back-center area. Maybe ~3 units.

[qrr_0041] obj_0-obj_2 vs obj_4-obj_8: obj_4 is front-center, obj_8 is far back. Large distance. obj_0-obj_2 < obj_4-obj_8. Answer: <

[qrr_0042] obj_0-obj_2 vs obj_4-obj_9: obj_4 front-center, obj_9 far back-left. Very large distance. Answer: <

[qrr_0043] obj_0-obj_2 vs obj_5-obj_6: obj_5 center, obj_6 right. Moderate distance. obj_0-obj_2 ~= obj_5-obj_6? Hard to tell. obj_5-obj_6 seems moderate. Answer: ~=

[qrr_0044] obj_0-obj_2 vs obj_5-obj_7: obj_5 center, obj_7 front-right. Small distance. obj_0-obj_2 > obj_5-obj_7? Answer: >

[qrr_0045] obj_0-obj_2 vs obj_5-obj_8: obj_5 center-front, obj_8 far back. Large distance. Answer: <

[qrr_0046] obj_0-obj_2 vs obj_5-obj_9: obj_5 center, obj_9 far back-left. Large distance. Answer: <

[qrr_0047] obj_0-obj_2 vs obj_6-obj_7: obj_6 right, obj_7 front-right. Small distance. obj_0-obj_2 > obj_6-obj_7. Answer: >

[qrr_0048] obj_0-obj_2 vs obj_6-obj_8: obj_6 right-front, obj_8 far back-left. Very large. Answer: <

[qrr_0049] obj_0-obj_2 vs obj_6-obj_9: obj_6 right-front, obj_9 far back-left. Very large. Answer: <

[qrr_0050] obj_0-obj_2 vs obj_7-obj_8: obj_7 front-right, obj_8 far back-left. Large. Answer: <

[qrr_0051] obj_0-obj_2 vs obj_7-obj_9: obj_7 front-right, obj_9 far back-left. Very large. Answer: <

[qrr_0052] obj_0-obj_2 vs obj_8-obj_9: obj_8 and obj_9 are close together in back area. Small distance. obj_0-obj_2 > obj_8-obj_9. Answer: >

[qrr_0053] obj_0-obj_3 vs obj_1-obj_2: obj_0 right-center, obj_3 far left. Large distance. obj_1 front-center, obj_2 back-center. Large distance. ~= or obj_0-obj_3 > obj_1-obj_2? Answer: ~=

[qrr_0054] obj_0-obj_3 vs obj_1-obj_4: obj_1 front-center, obj_4 center-left. Moderate. obj_0-obj_3 is large. Answer: >

[qrr_0055] obj_0-obj_3 vs obj_1-obj_5: obj_1 front-center, obj_5 center. Small/moderate distance. obj_0-obj_3 > obj_1-obj_5. Answer: >

[qrr_0056] obj_0-obj_3 vs obj_1-obj_6: obj_1 front-center, obj_6 right-front. Moderate. obj_0-obj_3 large. Answer: >

[qrr_0057] obj_0-obj_3 vs obj_1-obj_7: obj_1 front-center, obj_7 front-right. Small/moderate. obj_0-obj_3 >. Answer: >

[qrr_0058] obj_0-obj_3 vs obj_1-obj_8: obj_1 front, obj_8 far back. Large distance. ~= with obj_0-obj_3? Answer: ~=

[qrr_0059] obj_0-obj_3 vs obj_1-obj_9: obj_1 front, obj_9 far back-left. Very large. Answer: <

[qrr_0060] obj_0-obj_3 vs obj_2-obj_4: obj_2 back-center, obj_4 center-left. Moderate-large. obj_0-obj_3 large. Answer: >
